---
title: "Publication-Ready Figures"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Publication-Ready Figures}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5)
library(ggpower)
```

ggpower provides plotting helpers with consistent typography and export-ready
styling.

## Power Curve

```{r, eval=FALSE}
plot_power_curve("t_one_sample", n_values = seq(20, 100, by = 10),
                 d = 0.5, alpha = 0.05)
```

## Distribution Overlay

```{r, eval=FALSE}
result <- power_compute("t_one_sample", "post_hoc", d = 0.5, n = 40)
plot_distribution(result)
```

## Export

```{r, eval=FALSE}
p <- plot_power_curve("t_one_sample", n_values = seq(20, 100, by = 10),
                      d = 0.5, alpha = 0.05)
save_power_plot(p, "one-sample-power.png", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 320)
```
